name: [oss] expressjs/express PR #7181: restore >20 repeated-key array parsing via qs arrayLimit:1000

source.title: fix: restore array parsing for req.query repeated keys (#7147)

notes: Adds arrayLimit:1000 to the existing qs.parse extended config (allowPrototypes already present, unchanged); raises an array cap to restore prior behavior, does not remove a guard or introduce a sink.

provenance.note: Reviewed-TN (single annotator): Adds arrayLimit:1000 to the existing qs.parse extended config (allowPrototypes already present, unchanged); raises an array cap to restore prior behavior, does not remove a guard or introduce a sink.
